<script setup lang="ts"> import { Link } from '@inertiajs/vue3'; defineProps<{ href: string; }>(); </script> <template> <Link :href="href" class="block w-full px-4 py-2 text-start text-sm leading-5 text-gray-700 transition duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-gray-100 focus:bg-gray-100 focus:outline-none dark:text-gray-300 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 dark:focus:bg-gray-800" > <slot /> </Link> </template>
